reviews.comment:
la verdad el aca de flores es una verguenza! hace 2 semanas estoy llamando y nadie es capas de atenderte.. hace 1 semana me atiende una mina por fin! y en ves de tratarme con respeto me trata re mal onda como si me conociera de toda la vida... me pidió el teléfono porque estaba ocupada no podía ayudarme en ese momento.. y nunca mas me llamo!
UNA VERGUEZA la atención que tienen! pongan un poco mas de merito en eleguir a la gente que trabaja para ustedes!... que su sueldo lo pagamos todos los qe tenemos su servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, the Flores branch is a disgrace! I've been calling for two weeks and no one answers. A week ago, a woman finally answered! And instead of treating me with respect, she was incredibly rude, like she'd known me forever. She asked for my phone number because she was busy and couldn't help me at that moment, and she never called me back!
The service is a disgrace! You should put more effort into choosing your employees! We, the customers, are the ones who pay their salaries.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRa3NXNWFnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
To renew your driver's license, go somewhere else. They're a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBLWJuNUFnEAE

reviews.comment:
dos horas al teléfono me cortaron 5 veces y te dejan en espera una vergüenza, esto es lo que pago

(Translated by Google)
I was on the phone for two hours, they hung up on me five times and left me on hold. It's a disgrace. This is what I pay for.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBcF9qX1FBEAE

reviews.comment:
Faltan  playeros. Bar mal atendido y precios altos.

(Translated by Google)
There are not enough beachgoers. The bar is poorly run and the prices are high.

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay que esperar más de 10 minutos para cargar porque hay pocos playeros para la cantidad de clientes que llegan a la estación de servicio. En el lubricentro nos atendieron bien. Lo mismo en la confiteria.

(Translated by Google)
You always have to wait more than 10 minutes to fill up because there aren't enough attendants for the number of customers at the gas station. The service at the lube center was good, as was the service at the café.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdE9MdHNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza lo único que hacen bien es Sacarle la plata a la gente , quiero dar de baja y nunca me atienden y te dan vueltas..

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace, the only thing they do well is take people's money. I want to cancel my subscription and they never answer me and just give me the runaround.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBOHZLc0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Saque el registro y la atención me deja mucho que desear ,muy mal educadas las empleadas y poca organización.

(Translated by Google)
I checked out and the service left a lot to be desired; the employees were very rude and poorly organized.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNDUyUHR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atencion del lubricentro deja mucho que desear, ademas te mandan a pagar justo cuando le tienen que poner el aceite, me estaran cagando? ya no voy a ir mas..voy a otro ACA

(Translated by Google)
The service at the lube center leaves much to be desired. They even send you to pay just when they have to put in the oil. Are they screwing me? I'm not going back anymore... I'm going somewhere else.
